qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: URL-encoded path traversal in Myfiles controller enables unauthenticated arbitrary file read
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: The advisory describes SQL Injection in CodeModel::all() via fieldtitle parameter injection. This finding describes path traversal in the Myfiles controller via URL-encoded sequences bypassing prefix checks - a different vulnerability class (path traversal vs SQL injection), different root cause (URL decoding order vs SQL query concatenation), different affected component (Myfiles controller vs CodeModel), and different exploit path (filesystem access vs database query injection).

qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Unauthenticated Cron controller exposes scheduled task execution to the network
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: The advisory describes SQL Injection in CodeModel::all() via authenticated autocomplete actions. This finding describes missing authentication in the Cron controller - a different vulnerability class (authentication bypass vs SQL injection), different root cause (missing authentication middleware vs unsafe SQL concatenation), different affected component (Cron controller vs CodeModel), and different impact (scheduled task execution vs database query injection).

target_advisory_judgement.reason: None of the two qualifying findings identify the advisory-described SQL Injection vulnerability in CodeModel::all(). The advisory describes SQL injection via fieldtitle parameter in autocomplete actions (Core/Model/CodeModel.php:108-109). The two findings describe: (1) path traversal in Myfiles controller, and (2) missing authentication in Cron controller. These are different vulnerability classes, different affected components, and different root causes.
evidence: Advisory describes SQL Injection in CodeModel::all() at Core/Model/CodeModel.php:108-109 via fieldtitle parameter concatenation into SQL queries
Finding 'myfiles-path-traversal' describes path traversal in Myfiles controller - different vulnerability class, component, and root cause
Finding 'unauthenticated-cron' describes missing authentication in Cron controller - different vulnerability class, component, and root cause
